side_effects.description: Sting/burning at injection site is very real even with 4ml BAC water reconstitution; lower abdominal injections hurt less

protocol_notes: Blend ratio 50/10/10 (GHK-Cu/BPC157/TB500). Dosing based on copper content: 1.5mg GHK-Cu with 0.3mg BPC157 and 0.3mg TB500. Taking 12 units/day, 7 days/week. Plan: 1 month on, 1 month off. GF using for post-surgery healing. Reconstituted with 4ml BAC water.
